data.title: Machine learning algorithm predicts XRP price on August 1, 2025
data.description:
XRP is entering one of its most closely watched trading windows in recent months, with the looming release of 1 billion XRP tokens by Ripple and unconfirmed reports of behind-closed-doors discussions between the SEC and Ripple casting a shadow of intrigue over the market. These twin catalysts come at a time when the token has only just begun cooling from a strong July rally, leaving traders divided on whether the next move will be a decisive breakout or a deeper correction to the one which wiped $20 billion from the tokens market cap in just 24 hours on July 23. To cut through the noise, Finbold’s AI price prediction agent deployed a machine learning framework blending three advanced models, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Grok 2 Vision, supported by a battery of technical indicators including MACD, RSI, stochastic oscillators, and 50-day moving averages
source: https://finbold.com/machine-learning-algorithm-predicts-xrp-price-on-august-1-2025/

The entrepreneur acknowledged that ETFs simplify investing for average participants but emphasized they remain “paper assets” that cannot [. .

data.title: Monochrome Bitcoin ETF Reports Holdings and AUM
data.description: According to PANews, as of July 24, 2025, Australia's Monochrome Spot Bitcoin ETF (IBTC) has disclosed its holdings of 956 bitcoins. The fund's assets under management (AUM) have reached 171 million Australian dollars.

data.title: Carbon Coin Protocol Achieves Milestone in Carbon Credit Digitization
data.description:
According to Foresight News, China Carbon Neutrality Group (01372.HK) has announced a significant development in its carbon credit digitization efforts. The group's subsidiary, Future Marvel Limited, has successfully completed the data integration for its Carbon Coin protocol, enabling the on-chain representation of 200,000 tons of carbon credits.

The Carbon Coin protocol marks a crucial step for the company in the digitalization of carbon credits. The completion of data integration with relevant systems provides robust technical support for the on-chain management, trading, and subsequent processes of carbon credits.

"Carbon credit on-chain" refers to the digital representation and certification of carbon quotas or voluntary carbon reductions, such as Verified Carbon Standard (VCS) and Gold Standard carbon assets, using blockchain technology. This approach ensures transparent management and efficient circulation throughout the entire lifecycle of carbon assets.

data.title: AguilaTrades Increases Ethereum Long Position
data.description: According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring reveals that the contract trading giant AguilaTrades has significantly increased its Ethereum long position by 25 times. The current long position stands at 17,500 ETH, valued at approximately $65 million. The liquidation price for this position is set at $3,601.35.
